projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Organize resources and manage access control by project.
projects.dialogs.create.title: Create Project
projects.dialogs.edit.title: Edit Project
projects.dialogs.archive.title: Archive Project
projects.dialogs.archive.description: Are you sure you want to archive project "{{name}}"? Archived projects will no longer appear in the active list.
projects.dialogs.activate.title: Activate Project
projects.dialogs.activate.description: Are you sure you want to activate project "{{name}}"? Activated projects will appear in the active list again.
projects.dialogs.delete.title: Delete Project
projects.dialogs.delete.warningTitle: This action cannot be undone. The project's roles, user relationships, and related data will be automatically removed.
projects.dialogs.fields.name.label: Project Name
projects.profiles.title: Profiles
projects.profiles.description: Manage channel access profiles for this project.
projects.profiles.activeProfileDescripti: Select the active profile. Leave empty for no restrictions.
projects.profiles.allowedChannelsDescrip: Only these channels will be used for routing. Leave empty for no restriction.
projects.profiles.allowedChannelTagsDesc: Only channels with matching tags will be used.
projects.profiles.validation.atLeastOneP: At least one profile is required
